description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle, visually resembling the AK-47, with a combination of wood and metal components. The stock and handguard are made of a warm brown wood, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from matte black metal. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, a prominent front sight post, and a rear sight notch. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped and also appears to be made of black polymer or metal. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with exposed mechanical elements and a simple, functional aesthetic. The rifle's proportions and details suggest it is designed for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A classic AK-style assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and curved magazine. The design is robust, with visible iron sights and a utilitarian finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile, with the magazine curve and wooden components clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
